hero.tagline: A complete open-source firmware for the Xteink X3 and X4 e-ink readers.
hero.taglineSecondary: A single firmware supports both models, with full Korean EPUB and TXT reading.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Highlights of the Korean edition of CrossPoint Reader.

epub.title: Full Korean EPUB support
epub.description: Bundled KoPub Batang plus custom .epdfont fonts render Hangul, Hanja, and special characters cleanly. Supports EPUB, TXT, XTC, and XTCH formats.

flasher.title: One-click web flasher
flasher.description: Flash directly over USB from Chrome or Edge—no esptool install or driver setup required. Partition detection and automatic hard reset are handled for you.

wifi.title: WiFi file management & OPDS
wifi.description: Upload wirelessly via the built-in web server, download straight from OPDS catalogs, or share files in hotspot mode without a router.

sync.title: KOReader cloud sync
sync.description: Connect to a KOReader Sync server to keep reading position and progress in sync across phones, tablets, and other readers. Calibre Web integration is also supported.

sensor.title: X3-only sensor features
sensor.description: Tilt-to-turn pages (QMI8658 gyro) and a status-bar clock (DS3231 RTC with NTP sync) are supported. Automatically hidden on the X4. (v1.2.0-ko.12)

smart.title: Smart reading environment
smart.description: Auto page turn, inline footnote navigation, manual refresh via the power button, and fine-grained layout controls. Customize the sleep screen with a cover or your own image.

quickStart.title: Quick Install
quickStart.subtitle: Install firmware right from your web browser.

usb.title: Connect USB
usb.description: Connect the X4 with a USB-C cable, or the X3 with the included magnetic cable, to your computer.

flasher.title: Run the web flasher
flasher.description: Open the web flasher, connect your device, and choose the firmware.

complete.title: Flash complete
complete.description: The device reboots automatically once flashing finishes. If it appears stuck, press the Reset button and hold the power button for at least one second to boot.

credits.intro: This Korean firmware is built on top of the project below.
credits.repoDescription: Open-source firmware for the Xteink X4 e-ink reader. Supports EPUB reading with WiFi file upload.
credits.sponsorPrompt: If you'd like to sponsor the project

links.title: Useful Links
links.subtitle: Handy resources to use alongside the Xteink X3/X4.

webFlasher.title: Official Web Flasher
webFlasher.description: Install firmware directly from your web browser.

x4Converter.title: X4 Converter
x4Converter.description: A file conversion tool dedicated to the X4.

epub2xtc.title: EPUB to XTC
epub2xtc.description: Convert EPUB files into the XTC/XTCH format.

calibreWorkflow.title: Calibre Workflow
calibreWorkflow.description: A Calibre plugin for optimizing EPUB files.

calibrePlugins.title: Calibre Plugins
calibrePlugins.description: A plugin that sends EPUB files from Calibre to CrossPoint Reader over WiFi.

discord.title: Discord Community
discord.description: Chat with other users and get help.

wallpaperConverter.title: X4 Wallpaper Converter
wallpaperConverter.description: Convert images into BMP files for the X4 sleep screen.
